blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the foreign key constraints and shape checks.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the persona scenario of running a consolidated report, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses the foreign key constraints or shape checks required for the scenario. The existing evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as booking confirmations and user interactions, but does not confirm the enforcement of the necessary constraints. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
